title: Zero-amount payment accepted without validation
description: User runs /pay bob 0 or /pay bob 0.00000000: parse_zec_to_zatoshi() returns Ok(0), a PaymentSession is created with amount_zatoshi=0 and persisted to the DB, a PaymentAction::Request is broadcast to the peer. The peer derives a fresh address and returns it. A ZIP-317-fee transaction for 0 ZEC is attempted. There is no application-layer guard rejecting zero amounts. Should be caught at parse time or at the top of the /pay handler before upsert_session() is called.
close_reason: Fixed: added amount_zatoshi == 0 guard after parse_zec_to_zatoshi in /pay handler. Prints '[pay] amount must be greater than 0' and continues.
